positive: Minimalist black and white line art illustration of a whimsical constellation of interconnected celestial bodies, forming abstract animal shapes (like a leaping fox and a sleeping cat) scattered across a deep midnight sky. The style should be highly detailed Japanese woodcut etching meets modern geometric linework. The primary subject should feature strong, clean silhouettes and dramatic contrast. Use negative space effectively, making the background part of the design. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, suitable for a central apparel print design. Crisp edges, high contrast, graphic depth, elegant composition, ultra-detailed, black on white.
